briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Num Lanes bitmask in Control register.
Link Failure bitmask in Interrupt register(s)
Read Local KSV bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Being Km bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Abort Km bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Key Set Select bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Local KSV ready bitmask in Key Management Status register.
Km Value ready bitmask in Key Management Status register.
XOR Enable bitmask in Cipher Control register.
Request bitmask in Cipher Control register.
XOR In Progress bitmask in Cipher Status register.
Request In Progress bitmask in Cipher Status register.
Cipher blank value bitmask, lower 24 bits.
DP Protocol value in Type register.
HDMI Protocol value in Type register.
RX Direction value in Type register.
TX Direction value in Type register.
Block Request value in Cipher Control register.
ReKey Request value in Cipher Control register.
RNG Request value in Cipher Control register.
This macro reads a value from a HDCP cipher register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is always performed.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP cipher core instance.
is the register offset of the register

simplesect.para: C-style: u32 XHdcp1x_ReadReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a HDCP cipher register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is always performed.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP cipher core instance.
is the register offset of the register
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style: void XHdcp1x_WriteReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if it is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating transmitter (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if the XOR (encryption) function is currently in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating in progress (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if the local KSV is ready to read.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating ready (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if the Km value is ready.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating ready (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the Display Port protocol.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating DP (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the HDMI protocol.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating HDMI (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the receive direction.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating receive (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the transmit direction.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating transmit (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
